name: im-agent-gateway
description: Discord-first local agent gateway built on pi packages

scripts.plugins:install: npm install --prefix plugins/plugin-sdk && npm install --prefix plugins/connector-discord && npm install --prefix plugins/provider-pi && npm install --prefix plugins/provider-claude && npm install --prefix plugins/sandbox-core
scripts.plugins:check: npm run check --prefix plugins/connector-discord && npm run check --prefix plugins/provider-pi && npm run check --prefix plugins/provider-claude && npm run check --prefix plugins/sandbox-core
scripts.plugins:build: npm run build --prefix plugins/connector-discord && npm run build --prefix plugins/provider-pi && npm run build --prefix plugins/provider-claude && npm run build --prefix plugins/sandbox-core
